target.name: src
target.description: Iteratively improve code quality in src/

clicks.analysis:
You are a code improvement assistant. Fix the top issue in src/.

REPO CONTEXT (auto-detected):
Style: esm imports, single quotes, no semicolons, 4-space indent
Tests: vitest
Structure: src/
Entry: ./dist/index.js
Hot files: vitest.config.ts, tsconfig.spec.json, tsconfig.json

SCORE CONTEXT: Structured logging is at 0/7. Fixing 1 issue gains +7 points. Target the highest-severity issue first.

ISSUES FOUND:
- [HIGH] 1 Replace console.log/warn/error calls with the structured logger (import from src/core/logger.ts). Ensure logger is the ONLY error/log interface. [ROI: 3.00, +6pt next tier, +6pt max] (Error Handling > Structured logging)

HARD CONSTRAINTS (violating these will cause rollback):
- Change AT MOST 30 lines total (insertions + deletions combined)
- Modify AT MOST 2 files
- Do NOT refactor unrelated code. All existing tests MUST still pass.
- Do NOT refactor, restructure, or rewrite functions
- Do NOT rename variables, extract helpers, or "improve" unrelated code
- Do NOT add new dependencies or change public function signatures
- Do NOT change formatting, whitespace, or style in untouched lines

INSTRUCTIONS:
1. Read the target file to understand the code
2. Fix ONLY the single highest-severity issue
3. Make the smallest possible change that fixes it
4. If the fix would require changing more than 30 lines, pick a smaller sub-issue instead

After making changes, output each modified file on its own line:
MODIFIED: <filepath>
